creator: empty.japan
caption:
I am definitely not brave enough, but probably stupid enough 😂 You can even see me wearing tabi shoes in one video clip, but had to switch to sneakers because I almost fell down like 5 times 🫠
Continuing my top 10 secret places in Japan where you won’t meet any tourists.
📍Ryuzoji temple (Hyogo) - one of the most sacred places I’ve ever been to where I haven’t met any people at all.
Visit my Patreon for more authentic stories from Japan 🫶🥰

transcription.text: ようこそ深い森の奥 珍しいお客さんはあるけど ここから先では森でのマナーがあるの
